# F081 Delta-Calibrated JEPA Wrapper

## Decision
`F081_DELTA_CALIBRATED_JEPA_TIER1_PASS_NONPROMOTING`

## Purpose
F080 improved transition and cross-modal retrieval but failed the clean pass gate because delta direction was below threshold. F081 tests whether the full JEPA output already contains a train-only linearly recoverable image-PCA delta direction.

## Key Results
- raw image-teacher transition improvement: `0.210156`
- raw image-teacher delta cosine: `0.769907`
- calibrated transition improvement: `0.229551`
- calibrated delta cosine: `0.953869`
- calibrated recall@1: `1.000000`
- calibrated delta rank: `6.784274`
- calibrated magnitude ratio: `1.005431`
- train calibrated delta cosine: `0.988572`
- calibrated delta cosine gain: `0.183962`
- calibrated transition gain: `0.019395`

## Calibrator
`train_only_ridge_from_jepa_predicted_delta_to_train_image_pca_delta`

## Leakage Controls
The F081 calibrator is fit only on train-table JEPA predicted deltas and train image-PCA delta teachers. It receives no condition_key, biological_key, exact perturbation one-hot, eval target mean, or pooled train+test statistic. Eval rows are used only after the fixed train-only calibrator is fit.

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F081 is a train-only calibration diagnostic around a real JEPA wrapper.
